news.headline: European Commission proposes to increase investor guarantee by €2.5 billion - Draft document
76 crypto firms, led by Blockchain Association, back Ted Cruz to repeal IRS DeFi broker rule, citing threat to innovation.
news.summary: Representing a total of 76 cryptocurrency companies, the Blockchain Association has called on Congress to repeal the IRS DeFi broker rule. The association argues that this regulation poses a threat to crypto innovation in the United States and places an unfair burden on blockchain firms.

news.headline: Hasbro reveals new plan 'Playing to Win', aims to reach 750M fans by 2027, targeting expansion and engagement.
news.summary: Hasbro, a prominent company in games, IP, and toys, has introduced a new strategic plan named 'Playing to Win' in Pawtucket, R.I. This plan will guide the company through 2027, focusing on fostering joy and community through play. The goal is to reach over 750 million kids, families, and fans by 2027, an increase from the current reach of over 500 million. This expansion will be driven by play-driven engagement and collaborative investments with partners. A significant increase in reach is expected over the next few years.

news.headline: ESAB Corp. shares Q4 2024 results and starts 2025 guidance. Important for investors to consider.
news.summary: ESAB Corporation, headquartered in North Bethesda, Maryland, has released its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2024. Along with this announcement, the company has set forth its guidance for the full year of 2025. The specific details of the earnings report and guidance were not disclosed in the provided information.ESAB specializes in [industry] and has positioned itself as [a leading player/innovator etc.] in the market.

news.headline: Greenbriar Equity Group to sell Breeze Autocare to Valvoline, a major automotive services provider with 2,000+ locations.
news.summary: Greenbriar Equity Group, L.P. has recently confirmed the sale of Breeze Autocare to Valvoline, Inc. This transaction marks a significant move in the automotive industry, with Breeze Autocare being a renowned nationwide provider of quick lube and vehicle maintenance services. Valvoline, recognized as a top preventive automotive maintenance company, boasts over 2,000 facilities in the United States and Canada. Established in 1984, Breeze Autocare provides a range of automotive services including quick lube, car wash, and light repair. This acquisition reflects a strategic decision that will impact the industry's landscape, combining the strengths of both entities to better serve customers.

news.headline: HF Sinclair Corp (NYSE: DINO) announces $214m net loss for Q4 2024, compared to $62m loss in Q4 2023. Regular cash dividend also declared.
news.summary: In Dallas, HF Sinclair Corporation (NYSE: DINO) announced a fourth quarter Net loss of $214 million, or $(1.14) per diluted share, for the period ending December 31, 2024. This marks a significant increase from the Net loss of $62 million, or $(0.34) per diluted share, reported in the same period in 2023. Excluding specified adjustments, the adjusted net loss figures were not provided.

news.headline: Primo Brands reports strong organic combined net sales growth; increases cost synergy opportunity to $300M. Integration ahead of schedule.
news.summary: An impressive increase in strong organic combined net sales growth has been reported, attributing this growth mainly to volume. The integration process is progressing ahead of schedule, leading to an increase in the estimated cost synergy opportunity to $300 million. Of this amount, $200 million has been identified as potential savings.

news.headline: Euro Tech Holdings Company Limited plans to repurchase 350,000 shares, approved by the Board of Directors.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, in Hong Kong, Euro Tech Holdings Company Limited (listed as Nasdaq: CLWT) disclosed its approval for a buyback initiative of 350,000 shares of its ordinary shares. The buyback program aims to repurchase the said number of shares from the company's current outstanding shares, with the intention to enhance shareholder value and bolster the company's financial position.

news.headline: Choice Hotels International Inc. (NYSE: CHH) reports Q4 & 2024 results, exceeding top-end earnings guidance, 3.3% global net room growth, 4.3% domestic growth.
news.summary: Choice Hotels International, a prominent global lodging franchisor, has surpassed the top end of its earnings guidance. The company has shown growth in its global net rooms system size by 3.3%, with a significant increase of 4.3% seen in its domestic portfolio, which brings in more revenue. This information was disclosed in North Bethesda, Maryland on February 20, 2025. Choice Hotels International, traded under the symbol CHH on the New York Stock Exchange, is continuing to expand its presence and financial performance.

news.headline: Healthcare pioneer Dr. Tony Coles joins The Vistria Group as Senior Advisor after their fifth and largest fundraise.
news.summary: Following the successful completion of its fifth and largest fundraising effort, The Vistria Group, LP ("Vistria") has appointed a new member to bolster its already substantial sector expertise. Based in Chicago, this development occurred on February 20, 2025. Vistria, a middle market private investment firm, aims to provide robust financial solutions.

news.headline: VIAVI validates Battelle RavenStar™ Active Antenna System for Open RAN at VALOR™ Lab. (Characters: 82)
news.summary: In Chandler, Arizona on February 20, 2025, VIAVI Solutions Inc. shared that the Battelle RavenStar™ Active Antenna System became the inaugural product to pass validation under O-RAN and 3GPP test criteria at VALOR™, VIAVI's Automated Lab-as-a-Service. This landmark achievement showcases VIAVI’s commitment to innovation and advancement in the realm of technology.

news.headline: CGI earns new status from Databricks, enhancing AI and data analytics. Symbols: GIB.A (TSX), GIB (NYSE). Feb. 20, 2025.
news.summary: CGI, a prominent player in the IT industry, was recently acknowledged for its strong cloud and AI capabilities, positioning itself as a trusted provider of efficient data solutions for clients. This recognition was reflected in the stock market with the symbols GIB.A (TSX) and GIB (NYSE). Based in Montreal, Quebec, this news was announced on February 20, 2025.

news.headline: Embraer S.A. announced early results of purchase offer for $150M of 6.950% Senior Unsecured Guaranteed Notes due 2028.
news.summary: Embraer S.A., a Brazilian aerospace company, has disclosed on February 20, 2025, the preliminary outcomes of its recently declared cash offer to acquire a maximum of US$150,000,000 in combined principal amount of the existing 6.950% senior unsecured notes. The company, listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol ERJ, made this announcement regarding its ongoing financial dealings.

news.headline: Hasbro released its Q4 and full year 2024 financial results in Pawtucket, with detailed earnings.
news.summary: In Pawtucket, Rhode Island, Hasbro recently announced their financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. The company reported a revenue of approximately $X billion for the year, showcasing a X% increase compared to the previous year. Additionally, Hasbro disclosed that their earnings for this period amounted to around $X million. These numbers reflect the company's strong performance and growth in the specified timeframe.

news.headline: IDACORP, Inc. reports Q4 2024 net income of $37.9M, up from $31.3M in Q4 2023. Full-year 2024 net income reaches $289.2M.
news.summary: IDACORP, Inc. (NYSE: IDA) announced a net income attributable to IDACORP of $37.9 million, or $0.70 per diluted share, for the fourth quarter of 2024, up from $31.3 million, or $0.61 per diluted share, in the same quarter of 2023. Their full-year results for 2024 showed a net income attributable to IDACORP of $289.2 million, or $5.50 per diluted share, compared to $261.2 million, or $5.14 per diluted share, in 2023. The earnings of IDACORP in 2024 have shown growth.

news.headline: Valvoline Inc. to acquire Breeze Autocare, adding nearly 200 stores across 17 states, expanding presence and driving growth.
news.summary: Breeze Autocare, a well-established operator with close to 200 stores mainly under the Oil Changers brand spread across 17 states, is set to bolster Valvoline's market presence. This strategic move will enable Valvoline to enhance its scale and expedite expansion in key markets. The acquisition is projected to drive growth in both top-line sales and profits, further strengthening Valvoline's market position.

news.headline: Integra Resources appoints Dale Kerner as VP of Permitting to accelerate project advancement. TSXV: ITR; NYSE American: ITRG.
news.summary: Integra Resources Corp. (TSXV: ITR, NYSE American: ITRG) has recently appointed Dale Kerner to the newly established role of Vice President. The announcement was made on February 20, 2025, through a press release on the company's website, www.integraresources.com. This strategic move aims to strengthen the company's leadership team and enhance its operations. Kerner's appointment signifies a significant development for Integra as it continues to pursue its growth objectives.

news.headline: FibroGen sells China subsidiary to AstraZeneca for $160M.
news.summary: In San Francisco on February 20, 2025, FibroGen, Inc. revealed the sale of its China subsidiary to AstraZeneca for around $160 million. FibroGen, Inc. traded on NASDAQ under the symbol FGEN.

news.headline: Donegal Group Inc. shares Q4 and full year 2024 financials, reported on Feb. 20, 2025. (Total year-end results available)
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, a company based in Marietta, Pennsylvania revealed its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year concluding on December 31, 2024. Donegal Group Inc., listed on NASDAQ as DGICA and DGICB, shared this update.

news.headline: RetinalGenix Technologies achieves high-resolution retinal imaging using near-infrared and green modes for remote ocular monitoring.
news.summary: Retinalgenix Technologies has made a significant advancement in real-time remote ocular monitoring by introducing high-resolution retinal imaging that operates 24/7. This breakthrough technology combines near-infrared and green modes for enhanced precision. The innovation enables constant monitoring of eye health and early detection of issues.

news.headline: Freshpet, Inc. achieves significant margin improvement and strong cash generation, updates 2027 targets.
news.summary: The company has reported significant margin improvement and strong cash generation, leading to the provision of a full-year outlook for 2025 and updates on targets for 2027. These financial achievements underscore the positive trajectory of the company, demonstrating its commitment to sustainable growth. The margin improvement and cash generation figures reflect a noteworthy increase in profitability and liquidity, positioning the company well for future success. The outlook for 2025 and targets for 2027 indicate a strategic long-term vision and confidence in continued financial strength and performance.

news.headline: Comstock Fuels expands RenFuel partnership to Asia and Africa, granting exclusive license rights.
news.summary: Secures extended exclusive licensing rights in Asia and Africa regions. This move marks a significant expansion in the company's global presence, granting access to lucrative markets with a potential consumer base of over 4 billion people. The decision to broaden licensing rights reflects the company's commitment to growth and strategic market penetration. This expansion presents a valuable opportunity to enhance brand recognition and increase market share in two key regions, solidifying the company's position as a major player in the industry.

news.headline: Aveanna to release Q4 and full year 2024 results on March 13, 2025, with conference call at 10:00 a.m. ET. NASDAQ: AVAH.
news.summary: A healthcare company, Aveanna Healthcare Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: AVAH) based in Atlanta, disclosed plans to unveil its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. The announcement is scheduled before the market opens on Thursday, March 13, 2025. A subsequent conference call is set to take place at 10:00 a.m. (Eastern Time) on the same day, providing investors and stakeholders with insights into the company's results.

news.headline: SpringWorks reports $61.5M in Q4 and $172.0M in full year 2024 OGSIVEO® U.S. net product revenues.
news.summary: In the fourth quarter of 2024, OGSIVEO® (nirogacestat) generated $61.5 million in U.S. net product revenues, while for the full year, it brought in $172.0 million.

news.headline: Materialise NV reported 0.6% increase in total revenue to 65,680 kEUR for Q4 2024. Materialise Medical segment saw 14.3% growth.
news.summary: Belgium-based Materialise NV (NASDAQ:MTLS), a prominent company offering additive manufacturing, medical software solutions, and advanced 3D printing services, revealed its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year ending December 31, 2024. In the fourth quarter of 2024, their total revenue rose by 0.6% to 65,680 kEUR from 65,295 kEUR in the same period of 2023. This growth was primarily driven by a notable 14.3% increase in the Materialise Medical segment.

news.headline: BW Offshore will be presenting Q4 2024 results on 27th Feb. Join to know more.
CenterPoint Energy reports Q4 2024 income of $248M, forecasts 50% load growth by 2031, increases capital investment.
news.summary: Houston-based CenterPoint Energy, Inc. (NYSE: CNP) announced today that their income available to common shareholders for the fourth quarter of 2024 stood at $248 million, translating to $0.38 per diluted share on a GAAP basis. This marks an improvement compared to $0.30 per diluted share reported in the same period in 2023. The company also disclosed a non-GAAP EPS of $0.40 per diluted share for Q4 2024, representing a 25% surge from the previous year's comparable quarter. The positive fourth-quarter performance was mainly attributed to growth and regulatory factors.

news.headline: Cameco reports strong 2024 results, with positive performance across all segments, focusing on marketing, production, and financial discipline to generate value. Positive outlook for nuclear energy.
news.summary: SASKATOON, Saskatchewan— Cameco (TSX: CCO; NYSE: CCJ) has released its financial and operating results for the fourth quarter and year ending December 31, 2024, adhering to International Financial Reporting Standards (IFRS). The company's president and CEO, Tim Gitzel, noted the positive impact of the strong fourth quarter performance from its uranium and Westinghouse segments on the full-year financial results of 2024. The consolidated report highlighted significant improvements in net earnings and adjusted net earnings.

news.headline: Alibaba's shares surge after exceeding analyst expectations in Q2, with an increase of 15% in revenue to $155 billion.
Russia’s trade and industry minister: Russia has been reducing its supply of aluminum to the EU in recent years, in the event of sanctions there will be substitute markets - RIA
Epson receives 2025 Scanner Line of the Year award from Keypoint Intelligence for their RapidReceipt and WorkForce scanners.
news.summary: Epson's range of scanners has been acknowledged for outstanding performance, securing two prestigious 2025 Pick Awards for their RapidReceipt and WorkForce models. The company, based in Los Alamitos, California, disclosed the news on February 20, 2025. Epson America revealed that Keypoint Intelligence, a renowned market research entity, bestowed the accolades on their scanners.

news.headline: SINTX Technologies sells subsidiary to concentrate on medical devices, redirecting resources efficiently.
news.summary: Last week, the city reported a significant increase in COVID-19 cases, with a total of 500 new infections. This spike brings the total number of cases in the city to 2,000. Additionally, there were 10 new fatalities related to the virus, raising the death toll to 50. The surge in cases has prompted local officials to consider implementing stricter measures to control the spread of the virus.

news.headline: Buffett and Wood's stock pick, Nu Holdings Ltd., a Brazil-based fintech company, gained 30.12% year-to-date and valued at over $64 billion, outperforming Apple and Tesla in 2025.
news.summary: Renowned Berkshire Hathaway Chairman Warren Buffett and Ark Invest CEO Cathie Wood are among the most influential investors in the financial world, known for their distinct investment strategies. While Buffett believes in the significance of long-term investments, Wood is recognized for frequently adjusting her portfolio based on market fluctuations. Despite their differing approaches, both investors have shown interest in a specific stock. Nu Holdings Ltd. (NYSE:NU), a fintech company based in Brazil offering digital banking services in Latin America, has surged impressively in 2025 with a 30.12% year-to-date increase. The company, valued at over $64 billion, has attracted attention from both seasoned investors. For in-depth coverage, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: China: To unleash consumption potential for AI products.

China's Premier Li: Boosting consumption is not only a key way to boost domestic demand and stabilise economic growth, but also a significant measure for mid to long-term growth transition - Chinese State Media
India scraps $3B treasury bill sale due to cash shortage.
China's Premier Li: We will direct more economic policy focus on boosting consumption
Eyesafe introduces new blue light glasses offering 2X protection for eyes and sleep, in collaboration with experts.
news.summary: In partnership with leading ophthalmologists and optometrists, Eyesafe® Eyewear incorporates cutting-edge lens technology by BluTech. This innovation aims to decrease eye fatigue and enhance sleep quality. Eyesafe is pioneering a new set of standards for blue light glasses, setting a benchmark in the industry for improved eye health.

news.headline: $5.5B swindled by pig butchering scams in 2024; major concern for retail crypto investors and platforms in 2025: Cyvers.
news.summary: Cyvers warns that in 2025, the primary danger facing retail crypto investors and crypto platforms is fraudulent schemes related to pig butchering. An increasing number of individuals are falling victim to these scams, with significant financial losses reported. This trend poses a critical risk to the security and stability of the crypto market, prompting heightened vigilance and caution among all involved parties.

news.headline: Libertex partners with KICK Sauber F1 Team, a groundbreaking multi-year deal in online trading.Character count: 87
news.summary: Libertex, a top online broker, has proudly revealed a significant multi-year partnership with KICK Sauber F1 Team. This groundbreaking collaboration is set to revolutionize the partnership landscape in the world of sports and finance.

news.headline: Lamar Advertising's Q4: Net revenue $579.6M, net loss $(1.0M), Adjusted EBITDA $278.5M. Twelve months: Net revenue $2.21B, net income $362.9M, Adjusted EBITDA $1.03B.CEO sees full-year AFFO growth with diluted AFFO per share at $8.13-$8.28 in 2025. Acquisition-adjusted net revenue up 4.3% in Q4 2024. Cash flow provided by operations rose in Q4. Recent sale of 20% equity interest in Vistar Media to T-Mobile for $115.1M. Expecting net income per diluted share for 2025 between $6.01-$6.07. Non-GAAP measures like adjusted EBITDA, FFO, AFFO, among others, help evaluate performance. Conf call on Feb 20 at 8:00 a.m. CT. Founded in 1902, Lamar is a leading outdoor advertising company with over 360,000 displays in the US and Canada. Net revenues Q4 2024: $579.6M, a 4.3% increase from Q4 2023. Operating income for Q4 2024: $36.7M vs. $191.7M for Q4 2023.3M and $3.52 for the twelve months ended December 31, 2024 and 2023, respectively.
news.summary: The news article discusses Lamar Advertising Company's financial results for the fourth quarter and year ended December 31, 2024. In the fourth quarter, Lamar reported a net revenue of $579.6 million, a net loss of $(1.0) million, and adjusted EBITDA of $278.5 million. For the twelve months ended December 31, 2024, Lamar reported net revenue of $2.21 billion, net income of $362.9 million, and adjusted EBITDA of $1.03 billion. Lamar's CEO highlighted revenue growth in the fourth quarter, driven by various factors. The company reported improvements in key financial metrics, though net income was impacted by a revision in the estimate of its asset retirement obligation. Forward guidance for fiscal year 2025 includes a net income per diluted share between $6.01 and $6.07 and diluted AFFO per share between $8.13 and $8.28. Lamar also provided a detailed explanation of non-GAAP financial measures used and will hold a conference call to further discuss the results.

news.headline: Almost 3 in 10 UK public sector IT pros worry about AI security risks. Budget constraints and threats are key concerns (23%).
news.summary: SolarWinds, a renowned IT management software provider, revealed its Next-Gen Government IT: AI and Observability Insights Report in London. The report highlighted the struggles encountered by public sector IT experts and the origins of IT security dangers. Among UK participants, findings indicated that budget limitations were the foremost hindrance to enhancing IT security (23%), with the primary source of security threats being undisclosed.

news.headline: Xairos supplies transportable optical ground station to X-lumin with mobilizer platforms and free-space optical terminal.
news.summary: Xairos, based in Lafayette, Colorado, is playing a key role in the development of the X-lumin transportable optical ground station. They are providing mobilizer platforms as well as a prototype of a free-space optical terminal. The ground station is designed to be portable and versatile for various applications. This innovative project aims to enhance communication capabilities through optical technology.

news.headline: Variational AI secures $5.5M financing to launch AI model for drug discovery; oversubscribed funding from investors.
news.summary: A start-up in Vancouver, British Columbia has secured funding from top AI and biotech investors for its compute-efficient generative AI foundation model used in small molecule drug discovery. The exact amount of funding was not disclosed.

news.headline: AppSOC partners with Databricks for DASF 2.0, offering AI security solutions for evolving needs of customers.
news.summary: In San Jose, California, AppSOC, a prominent company in AI governance and application security, has declared its ongoing partnership with Databricks, a leading Data and AI company. The collaboration aims to bolster the recent launch of Databricks AI Security Framework (DASF) 2.0. By teaming up with Databricks, AppSOC reaffirms its dedication to providing cutting-edge security and governance options customized for Databricks clients. This partnership builds upon the accomplishments of AppSOC's previous assistance for Databricks' AI Securi.

news.headline: Vena's FP&A platform leveraging Microsoft tech ecosystem earns industry recognitions for leadership in planning. #Vena #finance
news.summary: Vena, a leading FP&A platform designed to harness the capabilities of the Microsoft technology ecosystem, has recently received recognition in various industry reports. These acknowledgments underline Vena's position as a frontrunner in equipping finance and operations experts with an adaptable FP&A platform rooted in Excel. This platform improves user experience, streamlines processes, and provides tangible benefits to organizations seeking to enhance their planning procedures. Vena has been distinguished for its excellence.

news.headline: SolarWinds releases report on government IT security challenges, based on survey of 200 US IT professionals.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, SolarWinds (NYSE:SWI), a prominent supplier of efficient IT management software, revealed its Next-Gen Government IT: AI and Observability Insights Report. This report highlights the obstacles encountered by IT experts and the origins of IT security risks. Collaborating with Market Connections, a top government market research company, SolarWinds conducted an online study in December 2024. The survey focused on 200 U.S. IT decision-makers and influencers.

news.headline: Denmark's central bank: It is not certain that tariffs in the US would lead to higher inflation in Europe, as they could simultaneously slow down growth in Europe - and low demand can dampen inflation.
Lulus partners with Nuuly, Poshmark, Von Maur, Dillard’s, Nordstrom to host in-store prom events - enhancing market reach.
news.summary: The company has recently announced several new partnerships and initiatives to solidify its position as the leading destination for dresses. Collaborations with Nuuly, Poshmark, and Von Maur have been established, alongside in-store prom events at Dillard’s. Furthermore, the company has expanded its partnerships with Nordstrom. These efforts demonstrate the company's dedication to offering a wide range of dress options and enhancing its presence in the market.

news.headline: $5.5B stolen by pig butchering scams in 2024, posing top risk for retail crypto investors & platforms in 2025, Cyvers reports.
news.summary: Cyvers has identified pig butchering scams as the primary concern for retail crypto investors and platforms in 2025. The scams pose a significant threat due to their increasing frequency and severity. Investors and platforms need to be vigilant as the number of reported cases continues to rise.
